name: Crockpot Pork Roast
recipeIngredient: 1/2 package Lipton Onion Soup Mix or
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare your vegetables by cutting the carrots into pieces and halving the potatoes.
2. Place the vegetables in the following order: carrots, then potatoes, followed by the pork roast.
3. Mix the water with the onion soup mix (or chopped onion) to make a slurry.
4. Pour the mixture over the top of the roast.
5. Cook on low for about 10 hours. A beef roast can be substituted if desired.
